LanguageData.FCP_Faction_NCR_Deserters.label: NCR Deserters
LanguageData.FCP_Faction_NCR_Deserters.description: A rogue faction of former NCR soldiers and officers who have deserted the Republic. Disillusioned with the NCR's leadership, they now operate as a hostile paramilitary group, surviving through raids and mercenary work. Their organization is loose, but they are led by a cunning Rogue Colonel.
